title: Arctic's Essentials
description: A modern, performance-focused essentials mod for Forge servers. Homes, warps, teleportation, moderation, and more - without bloat.
body:
# рҹ§Ҡ ArcticвҖҷs Essentials
### A modern, high-performance essentials mod for Forge servers  
**Minecraft 1.20.1 В· Forge В· Java 17+**

> **ArcticвҖҷs Essentials** is a fully-featured, highly configurable essentials mod built for modern Forge servers.  
> Lightweight, modular, and engineered for stability вҖ” without unnecessary bloat.

---

## рҹҡҖ Why ArcticвҖҷs Essentials?

- вҡЎ **Performance-focused architecture** вҖ” built clean from the ground up  
- рҹ§© **Fully modular** вҖ” enable only what your server needs  
- рҹӣ пёҸ **Deep configuration** вҖ” per-feature TOML configs  
- рҹ”’ **Server-first design** вҖ” strong admin & moderation tools  
- рҹ’ҫ **Async data handling** вҖ” safe, structured player storage  
- вқҢ **No economy lock-in** вҖ” standalone by design, extensible later  

> Designed as a modern, lightweight alternative to legacy вҖңall-in-oneвҖқ utility mods.

---

## вңЁ Core Features

### рҹҸ  Homes
- Multiple named homes per player  
- Optional home sharing  
- Categories support  
- `/home`, `/sethome`, `/delhome`, `/homes`

### рҹҢҚ Warps
- Server warps (OP-controlled)  
- Public player warps  
- Optional sharing & cooldowns  
- `/warp`, `/setwarp`, `/pwarp`, `/warps`

### рҹ“Қ Teleportation
- TPA / TPAHere system  
- Warmups with movement & damage cancellation  
- Back history tracking (including death support)  
- `/back`, `/top`, `/jump`, `/tpall`, `/tpcancel`

### рҹҺІ Random Teleport (RTP)
- Distance-based RTP with configurable limits  
- Safe failure handling (no server crashes)  
- Cooldowns & delay support  
- `/rtp`

### рҹҸӣпёҸ Spawn
- Global or named spawn support  
- `/spawn`, `/setspawn`

### рҹ“§ Mail
- Offline player mail system  
- Persistent JSON storage  
- Join notifications  
- `/mail send`, `/mail read`

### рҹ‘Ҙ Player Info
- `/whois`, `/seen`, `/playtime`, `/near`  
- Enhanced `/list` with AFK & vanish states

### рҹ“Ҡ Statistics
- Playtime tracking  
- Deaths  
- Teleport usage  
- Home usage  
- `/stats`

---

## рҹ”§ Utility Commands

- `/enderchest`
- `/hat`
- `/trashcan`
- `/kickme`

### рҹҸғ Speed System (Updated)

- `/speed <0вҖ“20>` uses a clear multiplier system  
  - `1` = default speed (1x)  
  - Higher values scale logically up to a safe cap  
- Dedicated `/flyspeed <0вҖ“20>` command  
- `/flyspeed reset` included  
- Clean separation between walk and fly speed control  

---

## рҹӣЎпёҸ Admin & Moderation

### Admin (OP)
- Gamemode shortcuts  
- Fly, god, heal, feed  
- Vanish system (configurable behavior)  
- Inventory viewing  
- Item repair tools  

### Moderation
- Timed mute system  
- Jail system  
- Player notes  
- `/mute`, `/jail`, `/note`

### рҹҳҙ AFK System
- Manual & automatic AFK detection  
- Optional auto-kick  
- Fully configurable thresholds  

---

## вҡҷпёҸ Configuration

All features are configurable via TOML:
```
config/arctics_essentials/
в”ңв”Җ general.toml
в”ңв”Җ homes.toml
в”ңв”Җ warps.toml
в”ңв”Җ teleport.toml
в”ңв”Җ rtp.toml
в”ңв”Җ mail.toml
в”ңв”Җ moderator.toml
в”ңв”Җ statistics.toml
в””в”Җ admin.toml
```
- Toggle features on/off  
- Configure cooldowns & limits  
- Control permission requirements  
- Adjust teleport behavior  
- Fine-tune moderation systems  

---

## рҹ’ҫ Data Storage

Player data is stored cleanly as structured JSON:
```
<world>/arctics_essentials/<player-uuid>.json
```
Includes homes, stats, mail, back history, and more.

Designed for clarity, safety, and easier backups.

---

## рҹ“Ұ Installation

1. Download the JAR from **Modrinth**  
2. Place it in your serverвҖҷs `mods` folder  
3. Start your Forge **1.20.1** server  
4. Adjust configs in `config/arctics_essentials/`

---

## рҹ“Ӣ Requirements

- **Minecraft:** 1.20.1  
- **Forge:** 47.4.0+  
- **Java:** 17+  

---

## рҹӣЈпёҸ Planned Features

- Kits system  
- Time & weather commands  
- Item / XP utilities  
- Economy integration  
- Discord integration  
- Configurable keybinds  
- Support for Create Config Menu  

---
